title: 2014/15 Winter season is on the doorstep!!
summary: October 17th. Fundraiser for Alaska Avalanche School and Friends of the Chugach National Forest Avalanche Center! MSP presents "Days of My Youth" ski movie, two shows 7 and 9 pm. Tix available here November 7th 2014 Southcentral Alaska Avalanche Workshop November 13th 6th Annual F-CNFAIC fundraiser...
